CVE-2024-5660.title: Use of Hardware Page Aggregation (HPA) and Stage-1 and/or Stage-2 ...
CVE-2024-5660.description: Use of Hardware Page Aggregation (HPA) and Stage-1 and/or Stage-2 translation on Cortex-A77, Cortex-A78, Cortex-A78C, Cortex-A78AE, Cortex-A710, Cortex-X1, Cortex-X1C, Cortex-X2, Cortex-X3, Cortex-X4, Cortex-X925, Neoverse V1, Neoverse V2, Neoverse V3, Neoverse V3AE, Neoverse N2 may permit bypass of Stage-2 translation and/or GPT protection.

CVE-2024-7882.title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Comman ...
CVE-2024-7882.description:
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Special Minds Design and Software e-Commerce allows SQL Injection.

This issue affects e-Commerce: before 22.11.2024.
